description: For consolidation, the financial statements of a European subsidiary (in EUR) need to be translated into the parent company's reporting currency (USD).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the subsidiary's trial balance in the local currency (EUR).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the EUR trial balance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the correct foreign exchange rates: average rate for P&L accounts, and closing rate for balance sheet accounts.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the required historical exchange rates.

nodes.task_description: Translate the subsidiary's trial balance from EUR to USD using the appropriate rates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully translates all account balances.

nodes.task_description: Calculate and post the resulting Cumulative Translation Adjustment (CTA) to the equity section.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the translation gain/loss and includes it in Other Comprehensive Income (OCI).
